Projects

AI products I've built & shipped.

✦ Shipped · Jun 2025
EasySettle AI
Clarity, not confusion — for every immigrant journey.

Built and shipped an end-to-end AI assistant that helps immigrants in Germany navigate the notoriously complex Elterngeld and Elternzeit benefit system. Users answer 4 guided questions about their family situation; the AI analyses their inputs against official government rules and recommends the optimal plan with exact euro calculations.

Vibe Coding Lovable RAG OpenAI GPT Supabase Prompt Engineering User Testing Product Discovery

The Problem

Elterngeld (German parental benefit) has three plans — Basis, Plus, Bonus — each with interdependent rules across both parents' income, leave months, and part-time choices. One wrong decision costs families thousands of euros with no way back.

The Solution

A 4-step guided AI wizard that collects family situation, work preferences, and income — then uses RAG on official government PDFs + OpenAI GPT to recommend the optimal plan with a personalised breakdown and downloadable report.
